evals.prompt: Export screen-dashboard dan screen-order-list dari preview.html menjadi PNG. Jalankan server side, jangan minta saya screenshot manual.
evals.expected_output: A server-side headless browser export that saves screen-dashboard.png and screen-order-list.png from the specified HTML element ids.

evals.prompt: Saya punya app-design-preview.html yang dibuat dari skill preview. Tolong export semua screen yang ada id screen-* menjadi gambar PNG ke folder exports.
evals.expected_output: The workflow auto-detects all elements whose ids start with screen-, renders the HTML headlessly, and exports each element as a PNG in exports/.

evals.prompt: Ambil div dengan id screen-payment-success dari dist/mockup.html dan jadikan image high resolution untuk dikirim ke client.
evals.expected_output: A high-resolution server-side screenshot of only #screen-payment-success, using a headless browser with an increased device scale factor.
